blocks: using absence of observed contamination as proof that order never matters
discharge_requirements: Run a newly preregistered order contrast or deterministic permutation
Show that per-attempt fresh workers and read-only external state preserve the same scientific result
record.disposition: Use the frozen listed order for reproducibility, require fresh workers and contamination audits, and interpret only this order
record.source_description: The primary cycle uses a fixed seven-cell order; fresh-worker isolation controls state carryover but does not establish scientific order invariance
